activeFile.description: Absolute path of the active editor file; the daemon loads content (indexing / snapshot later).

workspaceRoot.description: Absolute workspace folder when one is open; otherwise the host may send the active file's parent directory so relative paths still resolve (single-file windows).

cursorPosition.description: Caret in the active editor (LSP / VS Code Position). The daemon resolves the innermost symbol at this location using its symbol index (e.g. tree-sitter tags), not the host's document symbol provider.

character.description: 0-based UTF-16 code unit offset within the line. Reserved for finer resolution; tag-based backend may use line only today.

contextSessionId.description: Internal-only key for persisting Gathered between RPCs (host assigns; user never manages it). Omit for ephemeral gathered.

reportApplyBatchId.description: Must match the prior result's applyBatchId when lastBatchApply is present.

lastBatchApply.description: Apply outcome per directive index for the batch identified by reportApplyBatchId (same length as that batch's directives).
